stemHtml: Choose the correct statement regarding the types of oils that are used as hydraulic fluid in aviation.

options.a: Only synthetic oil is used due to its superior properties.
options.b: Only mineral oil may be used for commercial aviation applications.
options.c: Synthetic or mineral oil can be used, but they cannot be mixed.
options.d: Synthetic and mineral oils are used, and can be interchangeable if the system is properly flushed.
